name: RPlog_Who_dare_refuse_a_Sith
title: An Offer at the Selene Day Restaurant
summary: During the crowded Selene Day festivities, the Imperial pilot Commander Jal'Dana Rall pores over reports and star charts at a restaurant table when the Warlord Vassily Korolov, the voice that has haunted her nightmares, seeks her out and sits down uninvited. Maintaining a porcelain composure, Jal'Dana reports that nothing has surfaced on Selene and that her orders keep her there through the festivities. Korolov, courteous but coldly machine-like, informs her that her orders may change: he has an upcoming, extremely dangerous covert operation deep in Republic space for which he wants her skills, an assignment she may accept or refuse but whose details she will never be briefed on. He confirms he will personally lead it and expects her answer by the night of the Ball. Though she knows she cannot truly refuse, Jal'Dana savors the small power of making him wait, and Korolov departs, brushing her mind through the Force with a parting warning not to choose incorrectly.
